title: neottia yunnanensis
intro: Neottia yunnanensis, also known as the Yunnan orchid or Yunnan lip orchid, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the orchid family, native to the mountainous regions of southwestern China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Neottia yunnanensis include reducing inflammation and pain, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Neottia yunnanensis is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or extract, and has been used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
